title: Plastic Jug 2L (2 Pack) Swirl Design Plastic Pitcher Jug with Lid & Vented Spout - Pimms, Summer Juices, Picnics and BBQ Garden Parties - Clear Design
features: 💧【 Clear Water Jug with Swirl Design 】 The attractive swirl design of this 2 pack plastic jug adds an aesthetic appeal, making the water jugs visually appealing for serving beverages at parties and gatherings. The clear water jugs with lids allows you to easily see the contents, making it convenient to identify the beverage and monitor the quantity remaining.

🍹【 2 Litre Capacity Jug with Lid 】 The 2-Litre Capacity of this juice jug is intended to serve numerous guests, making it ideal for parties and gatherings by eliminating the need for frequent refills. Its generous size allows you to serve a large number of beverages, while the cover keeps drinks fresh and avoids spillage or contamination. The plastic jug with lid is made of sturdy Polystyrene (PS) and measures 20.3 x 13.8 x 25.3 cm, making it both practical and convenient.

♻️【 Reusable 】 This pimms jug is designed for repeated use, making it a sustainable option compared to single-use containers. This water jug with lid combines practicality with style, making it a valuable addition to your kitchenware, whether you're hosting a party, going on a camping trip, or simply enjoying a drink at home.

🥂【 Versatile and Portable 】 Suitable for various occasions such as parties, camping trips, picnics, and everyday use at home. It can hold a wide range of beverages including water, juice, Pimms, cocktails, and more. The plastic water jug is lightweight than glass and easy to carry, this jugs with lids is ideal for outdoor activities like camping and picnics where portability is essential.
🛡️【 Warranty 】 This jugs for parties has a 100% warranty on it! If you have any issues with the cocktail jug please message us!
description: Product Description Previous page Collect them all! Available in 2 Designs, Single & Double Pack Volila's plastic jugs come in 1 or 2-packs with swirl or dimple designs. Lightweight & Reliable Crafted with Durable, Clear Plastic Crafted from shatter-resistant plastic, our jugs with lids offers both safety and durability. Pour & Drink in Style! Beautiful Swirl and Dimple Effect Designs Available in two different styles, these stylish plastic pitchers are fit for multiple occasions. No Spills or Messes! Comes with Fitted Lid & Vented Spout Our pitchers feature a vented spout and fitted lid for easy ice and fruit straining and pouring. Next page 1 Multiple Variations 2 Premium-Quality Plastic 3 Stylish Designs 4 Easy to Pour Product Features MADE OF FOOD-SAFE PLASTIC Crafted from strong polystyrene, our plastic jugs are shatter-resistent, perfect for social gatherings. REUSABLE Our chic and reusable pitchers offer both style and durability, eliminating the inconvenience of fragile glassware. LIGHTWEIGHT & DURABLE These lightweight acrylic jugs offer superior durability compared to other plastic pitchers, ensuring versatility for every occasion. EASY TO CLEAN To keep our plastic pitchers in top condition, hand wash with warm water, air dry, and gently wipe with a microfiber cloth. These jugs are made of sturdy Polystyrene (PS), ensuring durability and reliability. Do the volila Plastic Jugs come with lids? Yes, the volila Plastic Jugs come with lids. The clear water jug with lid is designed to keep drinks fresh, avoid spillage or contamination, and allow easy identification of the contents inside. What dimensions do the volila Plastic Jugs have? The jugs measure 20.3 x 13.8 x 25.3 cm, offering a practical size for various occasions. What is the purpose of the vented spout? The vented spout allows for smooth pouring without splashing or glugging, ensuring precision and cleanliness. What is the capacity of these jugs? Each jug has a capacity of 2 liters, making them ideal for storing moderate to large quantities of liquid.
